officialPurpose: A sacred hospital city where pilgrims become residents while seeking healing.
hiddenPurpose: A military-medical extraction system that harvests biological, emotional, and cognitive outputs from patients.
emergentPurpose: The city is becoming a living organism that expands in response to suffering, prayer, labor, and treatment waste.

verticalLogic.lower: waste, labor, quarantine, forgotten temple ruins
verticalLogic.middle: public hospital, markets, resident wards, worship spaces
verticalLogic.upper: administration, elite treatment, research, military control
verticalLogic.core: utilities, ancient healing machine, hidden extraction systems
verticalLogic.outerShell: public balconies, markets, housing, visible city life

navigationPrinciples.mainHiddenRoute: old temple stair inside the core
